DP.501.0000:
Professor: ...\f
Finally, you’ve come.
[0103,0000], was it?\f
Let me see your Pokémon again.\f
DP.501.0001:
...\f
Hmm...
I see...\f
This Pokémon seems to be rather
happy.\f
DP.501.0002:
Well well!\f
You’ve made your Pokémon evolve
already?!\f
DP.501.0003:
All righty then!\f
I’ll give that [0100,0000] to you as
a gift.\f
DP.501.0004:
Professor: Now that it’s yours, would
you like to give it a nickname?
DP.501.0005:
Professor: Hmm, OK, I see...
And you’re happy with that nickname?
DP.501.0006:
Professor: Your friend [0103,0001]
told me what happened at the lake.\f
I heard you battled very well,
despite it being your first time.\f
And, from what I can see, there is
a growing bond between you and that\r
Pokémon, though it is still young.\f
That’s why I would like to entrust
you with [0100,0000].\f
DP.501.0007:
Dawn: I’m so glad that you’re kind
toward Pokémon!\f
If you weren’t, I’d have to...
Oh, I just can’t say it...\f
DP.501.0008:
Lucas: Boy, am I glad you’re kind
toward Pokémon.\f
If you weren’t, well...
I don’t even want to think about it.\f
DP.501.0009:
Professor: Er-hem!
Let’s move on to the main topic.\f
There is something I want you
to do for me.\f
DP.501.0010:
My name is Rowan.
I study Pokémon.\f
First of all, I want to know exactly
what kinds of Pokémon live in the\r
Sinnoh region.\f
To do so, it is necessary to collect
data using the Pokédex.\f
This is what I wish to ask of you.\f
I want to entrust you with this
Pokédex.\f
Will you use it to record data on all
the Pokémon in Sinnoh for me?
DP.501.0011:
Rowan: ...\f
...\f
...\f
...\f
I can stand here without speaking for
hours. I’m a very patient man.\f
Let me ask you again, [0103,0000].\f
I want to entrust you with this
Pokédex.\f
Will you use it to record data on all
the Pokémon in Sinnoh for me?
DP.501.0014:
Rowan: That Pokédex is a very
high-tech device.\f
It will automatically record data on
every kind of Pokémon you encounter.\f
[0103,0000], I ask that you go
everywhere and meet every kind of\r
Pokémon in this region!\f
DP.501.0016:
Lucas: I’ve got the same kind of
Pokédex as you.\f
DP.501.0017:
Rowan: When you walked up Route 201
with your Pokémon, what did you feel?\f
I’ve lived for 60 long years.
Even now, I get a thrill when\f
I’m with a Pokémon.\f
Now, you should know that there are
countless Pokémon in this world.\f
That means there are just as many
thrills waiting for you out there!\f
Now go!\f
[0103,0000], your grand adventure
begins right now!\f
DP.501.0018:
Rowan: Go on!\f
[0103,0000], your grand adventure
awaits you!
DP.501.0019:
Dawn: The Pokémon that I used for
the first time was [0100,0001]!\f
If you would have chosen
[0100,0001] at the lake, we’d\r
have the same Pokémon now!\f
Not that it matters, but...\f
Anyways, I’m Dawn.\f
I also help the professor add pages
to the Pokédex.\f
So, in a sense, I’m just like you.\f
I just got a little head start on
you, that’s all.\f
I’ll be happy to teach you things.
Glad to meet you, [0103,0000]!\f
DP.501.0020:
Lucas: The professor asked me to
help, so I’m going to go out and fill\r
the Pokédex pages, too.\f
That makes us comrades working
toward the same goal.\f
I’ll teach you stuff later, OK?\f
DP.501.0021:
I’m [0103,0000]’s father.\f
I’ll be happy to assist you on your
quest for the professor.\f
Hahaha. Eh...
I’m sure we can count on you!
DP.501.0022:
Professor Rowan invented a new
Pokédex while working alongside a\r
professor from the Kanto region!
DP.501.0024:
Adventure Rule No. 1
The X Button opens the menu.
DP.501.0025:
Adventure Rule No. 2
Record your progress with SAVE.
DP.501.0026:
It’s crammed full of books with all
sorts of Pokémon information.
DP.501.0027:
There’s a lot of reference material
and research reports on Pokémon.
DP.501.0028:
Rowan: Ah, [0103,0000]!\f
You’ve come to show me your
progress on the Pokédex?\f
DP.501.0030:
What’s wrong?\f
You’re not going to tell me you’ve
seen too few to bother showing me?
DP.501.0031:
Bravo, [0103,0000]!\f
You’ve recorded all the Pokémon of
Sinnoh in your Pokédex!\f
This will help immeasurably with my
studies on Pokémon evolution...\f
DP.501.0032:
Rowan: Hm! [0103,0000], I’ve been
waiting to see you!\f
You’ve met every kind of Pokémon
there is in the Sinnoh region!\f
This will help immensely with my
studies on Pokémon evolution...\f
DP.501.0033:
Oak: Greetings, Professor Rowan!
It’s been a very long time!\f
I’ll tell you, Sinnoh certainly is
a long trip from Kanto.\f
Of course, if it means meeting new
Pokémon, there’s no distance too\r
great for the likes of us to travel.\f
DP.501.0034:
Rowan: Oh! If it isn’t my old
colleague, Professor Oak!\f
I should have expected as much from
the world’s authority on Pokémon!\f
We always used to joke, “Where
there are Pokémon, you’ll find Oak!”\f
It’s good to see that hasn’t changed
one bit!\f
DP.501.0035:
Professor Oak, let me introduce you
to my young assistant.\f
This youngster has filled every page
of the Sinnoh Pokédex for me.\f
DP.501.0036:
Oak: Ah, well, very glad to meet you!
As you’ve heard, my name is Oak.\f
I’ve been hearing a great deal about
you from Professor Rowan lately.\f
He’s been exuberant in praise about
a fantastic young Trainer.\f
I see that you live up to--no--that
you’ve surpassed his praise.\f
You’ve also got an impeccable sense
of timing.\f
You see, I had an errand to run for
Professor Rowan on my visit here.\f
He’d asked me to bring the data
for the National Pokédex, you see.\f
So, since you’re here, let me upgrade
your Pokédex with the National Mode.\f
After all, there are many kinds of
Pokémon in this world of ours!\f
DP.501.0037:
[0103,0000]’s Pokédex was upgraded
with the National Mode!\f
DP.501.0038:
Oak: I’m afraid it won’t be easy to
complete the National Pokédex.\f
However, I’m sure you will make an
honest attempt on our behalf!\f
DP.501.0039:
Rowan: Have no fear, [0103,0000]
will get the job done.\f
By the way, Professor Oak, what
compelled you to visit this region?\f
DP.501.0040:
Oak: Ah, yes. I’ve heard that the
Pal Park is now open.\f
If I remember correctly, it’s at the
end of Route 221.\f
The Pal Park has a special system
that attracts every imaginable kind\r
of Pokémon from every region.\f
I’ve come to make certain that
system is operating properly.\f
DP.501.0041:
[0103,0000], you should make an
effort to visit the Pal Park, too.\f
Oops! I’ll be late for my meeting if
I don’t get going!\f
OK, it was a pleasure seeing the both
of you! Bye, now!\f
DP.501.0042:
[0103,0000], you should make an
effort to visit the Pal Park, too.\f
Oops! I’ll be late for my meeting if
I don’t get going!\f
OK, it was a pleasure seeing the both
of you! Bye, now!\f
DP.501.0043:
Rowan: Off he goes, as busy as
ever...\f
DP.501.0044:
Now, [0103,0000]...\f
I have a gift here as your reward
for completing the Sinnoh Pokédex.\f
DP.501.0045:
Rowan: That’s the Pokémon Radar,
or just Poké Radar for short.\f
Use it, and it will indicate grass
patches where Pokémon are lurking.\f
I’d prepared that to help my field
assistants put together the Sinnoh\r
Pokédex, but you took care of that!\f
I’m sure it will be useful for your
goal of filling the National Pokédex.
DP.501.0046:
Rowan: The world is immense.
There are many more Pokémon.\f
That means there are many more
thrills for you to seek and enjoy!
DP.501.0047:
[0103,0000] checked the PC.\f
The screen is filled with special terms
and academic writing that is impossible\r
to figure out.
DP.501.0048:
Research materials are carefully
tucked away.
DP.501.0049:
The refrigerator is filled with
tasty sweets! Mmm...
DP.501.0050:
It’s really quite something!\f
Imagine... Cataloging every kind of
Pokémon in the Sinnoh region!\f
And in complete contrast, there’s
[0103,0000]...\f
Anyway, you’ve been great for the
prof’s Pokémon-evolution research!
DP.501.0051:
Yes, that’s correct.\f
Professor Rowan has been studying
Pokédex systems with Professor Oak.\f
Professor Oak is Professor Rowan’s
junior in terms of seniority.
